    (function() {
      try {
        document.body.classList.remove('body-theme-light', 'body-theme-dark');
        
        var themeModeValue = localStorage.getItem('themeMode');
        var themeMode = 'system';
        var theme = 'light';
        
        if (themeModeValue) {
          try {
            themeMode = JSON.parse(themeModeValue);
          } catch(e) {
            themeMode = 'system';
          }
        }
        
        if (themeMode === 'dark' || themeMode === 'light') {
          theme = themeMode;
        } else {
          if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) {
            theme = 'dark';
          } else {
            theme = 'light';
          }
        }
        
        document.body.classList.add('body-theme-' + theme);
      } catch(e) {
        document.body.classList.remove('body-theme-light', 'body-theme-dark');
        document.body.classList.add('body-theme-light');
      }
    })();

//]]>
</script>  <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) -->
